title: Manufacturing Engineer - CEAT Tyres - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - CEAT Tyres - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Manufacturing Engineer looking for your next big career move? CEAT Tyres in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CEAT Tyres:
CEAT Tyres is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CEAT Tyres!
